verses.text: And he spake also a parable unto them on the neccessity always to pray, and not to faint; Saying,
there was in a city a judge, which feared not God, and regarded not man:
And there was a certain widow in that city; and she came unto him, saying, Right me from my opponent at law.
And he would not for a time: but afterward he said within himself, Though I fear not God, and regard not man;
Yet because this widow gives me trouble, I will right her, lest by her coming to the end she weary me.
And the Lord said, Hear what the judge of the unrighteous saith.
And shall not God perform the righting of his elect, which cry unto him day and night, though he be long suffering over them?
I say unto you that he will perform the righting of them speedily. Nevertheless when the Son of man cometh, shall he find the faith on the earth?
